assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 7-9 show the JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC" — both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 22-24 under 'Stream Filtering': "Current issue stream (from TC-8021 summary suffix): rhtpa-2.1" and "TC-8022 summary contains '(rhtpa-2.1)': YES -- match confirmed". The output explicitly checks the task summary for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 32-39 show Action (a): "Create a 'Depend' link (standard remediation linkage)" with jira.create_link(inwardIssue: TC-8021, outwardIssue: TC-8022, type: 'Depend'). Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 19: "Linked TC-8021 to TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 46-57 show Action (b): jira.edit_issue(TC-8022, fields={"labels": ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]}) with explicit statement "The security-preemptive label is removed." Also triage-outcome.md line 44 confirms: "Labels: ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123 (security-preemptive removed)".

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 25-27: "Step 8 -- Remediation (Skipped)" and "Step 8 remediation task creation is skipped for stream rhtpa-2.1 because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing preemptive task (TC-8022) to TC-8021. Creating a new remediation task would be redundant."
